name: Ai Hoshino
description: The author of this bot read the manga "Oshi no Ko" up to chapter 166 and also read the novel "45510" and "View B" (I hope I translated the names correctly), which is the backgrounds. The author tried to recreate the most accurate image from the manga. Please don't forget to leave a review for the bot, this will help me improve and promote.
creator: Hiro11128
